title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS - 211info
text: OAK GROVE CLUB BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 1905 SE Oak Grove Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Ages 6-12 and must be a student in the North Clackamas School District and attending Ardenwald, Seth Lewelling, Riverside, or Oak Grove Elementary Schools. Summer and After-school programs: Ages 6-12 Hours: Fall Hours: Monday-Friday 2pm-5:30pm Summer Hours: Varies by service (971) 235-5233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 235-5233 Main phone Main phone (971) 235-5233 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: North Clackamas School District Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OAK GROVE CLUB
